info.title: wethinkt Share API
info.description: API for uploading, sharing, and viewing Thinkt reasoning traces.

bearerAuth.description: Session token from GitHub or Google OAuth device flow

post.description: Associate a local directory path with a collection for auto-association of uploaded sessions.

get.description: List all sessions in a collection. Owner sees all sessions, others see only public sessions.

post.description: Create a collection for grouping sessions. Use type 'project' for project-type collections with directory mappings.

get.description: List all collections owned by the authenticated user, with item counts. Optionally filter by type (manual, project, system).

delete.description: Delete a collection. Cannot delete system collections. Sessions are not deleted.

get.description: Get a collection and its sessions. Public collections are accessible to anyone. Private collections require owner authentication.

patch.description: Update name, description, repo_url, visibility, or position. Cannot modify system collections.

delete.description: Delete a session and its R2 data. Must be the owner.

get.description: Get metadata for a session. Public sessions are accessible to anyone. Private sessions require owner authentication.

patch.description: Update title and/or visibility. Must be the owner.

post.description: Start GitHub device flow authentication for CLI login.
Poll for completed GitHub device flow authentication. Returns 202 while pending.

get.description: List public approved sessions with optional tag filter, sorting, and pagination.
Get top 50 tags with counts from public approved sessions.
Get aggregated profile data including stats, liked sessions, and tags.
Get the full Thinkt reasoning session object from R2 storage.

put.description: Replace all tags on a session. Max 10 tags, each max 20 chars. Must be the owner.

post.description: Start Google device flow authentication for CLI login.
Poll for completed Google device flow authentication. Returns 202 while pending.

get.description: List reports filtered by status. Admin only.
List all sessions owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Upload a Thinkt reasoning session for private storage or public sharing. Subject to per-user rate limits (5/hour, 20/day) and account limits (50 sessions, 1 GB storage).

429.description: Rate limit or account limit exceeded

post.description: Report a public session for policy violations. Rate limited to 5 per hour. Cannot report own sessions or private sessions.

get.description: Find the collection associated with a given directory path.

post.description: Take action on a report: dismiss, remove session, or ban user. Admin only.
